text: {"verdicts": [{"commitment_id": 1, "new_status": "met", "reason": "Daniel Cho confirmed Cirrus Analytics acquisition closed 'on schedule in the final week of fiscal Q3, exactly as we committed.'"}, {"commitment_id": 2, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Management reaffirmed the Q4 2026 GA target for native Cirrus query capabilities; deadline has not yet arrived."}, {"commitment_id": 3, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "transcript does not address this commitment"}, {"commitment_id": 4, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Helena Vargas stated Q3 margin was 19.2%, putting them 'on track' for full-year ~19%; fiscal year not yet complete."}, {"commitment_id": 5, "new_status": "missed", "reason": "Helena Vargas explicitly stated GAAP operating income will be 'slightly negative' at -25 to -40 million for fiscal 2026, saying 'we did not achieve that commitment.'"}, {"commitment_id": 6, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "transcript does not address this commitment"}, {"commitment_id": 7, "new_status": "missed", "reason": "Daniel Cho stated 'we are not going to hit the end of fiscal Q4 2026 GA target for Stratus Copilot,' now targeting fiscal Q2 2027."}, {"commitment_id": 8, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Helena Vargas said EMEA is improving and mid-single-digit Q4 growth is 'increasingly confident' but achievable; Q4 not yet complete."}, {"commitment_id": 10, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Helena Vargas reaffirmed they 'continue to expect to fully exhaust the 500 million dollar authorisation by the end of fiscal 2026'; year not yet complete."}, {"commitment_id": 11, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "Helena Vargas confirmed 'we will revisit the authorisation level at the beginning of fiscal 2027'; deadline has not yet arrived."}, {"commitment_id": 12, "new_status": "still_open", "reason": "transcript does not address this commitment"}]}
